Appearances:
Plaintiff Violeta Galang is present.
Attorney James Mark Millar for the plaintiff.
Defendants Allen Arcilla Sr.is present, Allen Arcilla Jr. ispresent, Elaine Arcilla is NOT present.
Attorney Robert L. Berry appearing for defendants in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Olan Lambert, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions. This case did NOT settle. The trial date of Dec. 23, 2013 remains on calendar. (510/JPT)
